5.6. table¶

5.6.1. Argments Format:¶

heads=[{name:’xxx’,label:’label1’},
{name:’jb’,label:’jb’}]

rows=[{xxx:”jjy”,jb:’hahaer’}]

5.6.2. table的过滤器¶

class SalaryFilter(RowFilter):
names=['is_checked']
range_fields=[{'name':'month','type':'month'}]
model=SalaryRecords
